hooks.command: bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff check "$1" 2>&1 | head -20 || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run pyright "$1" 2>&1 | tail -5 || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py && "$1" != *test* ]] && grep -n "print(" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: print() found -- use logging instead" || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff format --check "$1" 2>&1 | head -10 || true' _ "$filePath"

bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py && "$1" != *test* ]] && grep -nE "(eval\(|exec\(|pickle\.|subprocess\.call|os\.system\(|__import__)" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: potentially unsafe operation found" || true' _ "$filePath"

bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && grep -nEi "(password|token|api_key|secret|credentials)\\s*=\\s*[\"\"'\"\"'][^\"\"'\"\"']*[\"\"'\"\"']" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: possible hardcoded secret found" || true' _ "$filePath"

bash -c '[[ "$1" == *models*.py ]] && { grep -q "__tablename__" "$1" || echo "[Hook] WARNING: __tablename__ not found"; grep -q "Base" "$1" || echo "[Hook] WARNING: does not inherit from Base"; }' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff format --check "$1" 2>&1 | grep -q "would reformat" && echo "[Hook] SUGGESTION: Run uv run ruff format $1" || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *models*.py ]] && echo "[Hook] REMINDER: Run uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m description"' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff check "$1" 2>&1 | head -20 || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run pyright "$1" 2>&1 | tail -5 || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py && "$1" != *test* ]] && grep -n "print(" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: print() found -- use logging instead" || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff format --check "$1" 2>&1 | head -10 || true' _ "$filePath"

bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py && "$1" != *test* ]] && grep -nE "(eval\(|exec\(|pickle\.|subprocess\.call|os\.system\(|__import__)" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: potentially unsafe operation found" || true' _ "$filePath"

bash -c '[[ "$1" == *.py ]] && grep -nEi "(password|token|api_key|secret|credentials)\\s*=\\s*[\"\"'\"\"'][^\"\"'\"\"']*[\"\"'\"\"']" "$1" | head -5 && echo "[Hook] WARNING: possible hardcoded secret found" || true' _ "$filePath"
bash -c '[[ "$1" == test_*.py ]] && cd /home/paul/projects/ccas && uv run pytest "$1" -x --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -30' _ "$filePath"
hooks.statusMessage: Running test to confirm RED state...

hooks.command: bash -c '[[ "$1" == *models*.py ]] && { grep -q "__tablename__" "$1" || echo "[Hook] WARNING: __tablename__ not found"; grep -q "Base" "$1" || echo "[Hook] WARNING: does not inherit from Base"; }' _ "$filePath"
